title: dasystephana andrewsii var. dakotica
intro: Dasystephana andrewsii var. dakotica, also known as Dakota dasystephana, is a plant species in the aster family, characterized by its small, daisy-like flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dasystephana andrewsii var. dakotica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
